creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

A lot of volume probing code was fixed in hal-0.5.13.  Try updating your ports 
tree, and retest.  If the problems persist, file a new PR with all of the 
required information at http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/halfaq.html 
INCLUDED IN THE PR.
